title: Dyke Systems Ltd
description: Sally and Susan aren’t your average suburban women, they’re business women! And they invite you to a prestigious seminar that could help you get filthy rich! Join Fag Packet, an award-winning cabaret, theatre and drag double act. Following a sell-out run at the Edinburgh Fringe, and receiving The Stage Fringe 5 Award, they’re back with their 5 star show. Serving up Fag Packet’s signature mix of comedy, physical theatre and drag, in a hilarious takedown of multi-level marketing schemes and the horrors of ruthless heteronormativity. So grab your wallet, your carabiner and get ready to find your inner Dynamic, Young, Knowledgeable, Entrepreneur!
content_warnings: Audience participation, scenes of a sexual nature, strong language, flashing lights, haze

venue.name: WundaBarn at The SpiegelGardens
venue.address: Victoria Gardens, Brighton and Hove, East Sussex

reviews.excerpt: Fag Packet are a London-based cabaret duo making their Edinburgh Festival Fringe debut. Their act features two American, repressed housewife types, living their best lives at the centre of a pyramid scheme, with the audience cast as their lucky new potential recruits.
